title: Moluccella microphylla
taxonomy: Moluccella microphylla is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. This family is commonly known as the borage or forget-me-not family. The Boraginaceae family is part of the larger order Borales and is native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa, with some species found in other parts of the world. The Borales order is within the larger clade of asterids, which also includes the orders Lamiales and Gentianales. The classification of Moluccella microphylla reflects its evolutionary relationships with other flowering plants.
uses: Moluccella microphylla is known to have various medicinal properties. It is used in traditional medicine to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs.
